epigraph.quote: an old lady & man with a dog in a push chair & even Batman & Robin

per_stop.quote: Mrs. Beale & 2 of her daughters sewed magnificent wall hangings, bedspreads, cushions & chair seats
lovely big airey rooms & views of woods
Great noisy children at the back, a nice service.
At Steyning we had a stupendous tea - rhubarb scones, rhubarb jam
When Queen Elizabeth called the Percys to live in the South, where she could keep an eye on them, they decided to develop the lodge into a home.
the Campins home that Simon visited when he was 10
We had supper & slept at Longwood House
